title: Novelty device
abstract: A novelty device comprising a vessel that includes a composition comprising water, oil, and particles (e.g., sand) that do not dissolve in either oil or water. When the contents of the novelty device are mixed (e.g., by manual manipulation or mechanical mixing) the water, oil, and particles form a column(s) of rising and descending material that forms various patterns. Various patterns may be produced depending on how the vessel and/or contents of the vessel are manipulated.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A novelty device for creating and enjoying different patterns or rising and descending material comprising: a cap; a water-tight vessel; and a composition within the vessel comprising: water; oil; and particles that do not dissolve in either the water or the oil, wherein upon mixing of the water, oil and particles, a column of rising and descending material comprising the water, oil, and particles that forms various patterns. 2. The novelty device of claim 1 wherein the water is selected from tap water, distilled water, purified water, sterilized water, or spring water. 3. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the oil is a vegetable oil selected from canola oil, corn oil, soybean oil, peanut oil, sunflower oil, safflower oil, cottonseed oil, coconut oil, olive oil, palm oil or a combination of two or more thereof. 4. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the particles comprise sand particles. 5. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the particles comprise luminescent particles. 6. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the particles comprise glitter particles. 7. The novelty device of claim 1 further comprising a base. 8. The novelty device of claim 7, wherein either the cap, the base, or both the cap and the base include a light for illuminating the vessel and the composition within the vessel. 9. The novelty device of claim 7, wherein the base includes a mixing device, wherein the mixing device is operatively connected to the vessel such that the mixing device causes the composition within the vessel to be mixed. 10. The novelty device of claim 9, wherein the mixing device is selected from a pump, a compressed air dispenser, a conveyor, an impeller, or a combination of two or more thereof. 11. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the water, the oil, and/or at least a portion of the particles include a dye. 12. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the vessel is a glass bottle. 13. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the glass bottle is coated with a non-stick coating. 14. The novelty device of claim 1, wherein the composition within the vessel is non-toxic. 15. A novelty device for creating and enjoying different patterns or rising and descending material comprising: a cap; a water-tight vessel; a base having a light for illuminating the vessel; and a composition within the vessel comprising: water; oil; and particles that do not dissolve in either the water or the oil, wherein upon mixing of the water, oil and particles, a column of rising and descending material comprising the water, oil, and particles that forms various pattern. 16. The novelty device of claim 15, wherein the water is selected from tap water, distilled water, purified water, sterilized water, or spring water. 17. The novelty device of claim 15, wherein the oil is a vegetable oil selected from canola oil, corn oil, soybean oil, peanut oil, sunflower oil, safflower oil, cottonseed oil, coconut oil, olive oil, palm oil or a combination of two or more thereof. 18. The novelty device of claim 15, wherein the particles comprise sand particles. 19. The novelty device of claim 15, wherein the particles comprise luminescent particles. 20. The novelty device of claim 15, wherein the particles comprise glitter particles.
